question: What are psychoactive substances and why are they prohibited during UAS operations?

options.text: Psychoactive substances are self-medication to relieve oneself from tiredness and could be consumed under UAS operations.
It is a drug to relieve all kinds of stress and depression and could be allowed during UAS operations.
It is common medication to be taken before an UAS operations.
The effects of medication will impair the UA pilot's ability to operate the UA safely and should not be consumed at any time during UAS operations.
